title: Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions:
Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions!
